scripts.db:generate: netlify dev:exec -- bunx --bun prisma generate --config prisma/prisma.config.ts --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: netlify dev:exec -- bunx --bun prisma migrate dev --name init --config prisma/prisma.config.ts --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:studio: netlify dev:exec -- bunx --bun prisma studio --config prisma/prisma.config.ts --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:seed: netlify dev:exec -- bunx --bun prisma db seed --config prisma/prisma.config.ts --schema prisma/schema.prisma
